title: antidesma erostre
intro: Antidesma erostre, also known as the velvet-leaved ironwood, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Antidesma erostre include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases. Antidesma erostre can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies as a powder or tincture.
